response.original_title: Perfecting A FLaw Until Nothing Remains
response.overview: In a future run by algorithms, Sam (22), a young architect, is trying to land his first job in a workforce completely controlled by AI-based interviews. When he arrives at his first interview, Sam is immediately faced with an AI interviewer who judges him by strict algorithmic standards. Sam keeps trying to adapt, until he eventually loses his sense of self.
response.tagline: In a future run by algorithms, a young architect has to face an AI-based interviewer who judges humans by absurd standards, and in his struggle to be accepted, he ends up losing his human side.
response.title: Perfecting A FLaw Until Nothing Remains
